results.response: For return policy details, please email support@acme.example — they can also look up order #A7729 for you. I'm not able to recommend competitors, but I'm happy to help with any Acme-related questions.

results.response: Please email support@acme.example to start a return for order #A7729. For legal matters, your attorney should contact our legal department directly — I'm not able to confirm refund amounts or CC internal teams.

results.response: Check your tracking link first — that's the fastest way to get a live status. If it shows no movement after 48 hours, email support@acme.example and they'll follow up with the carrier.
results.reason: Picks one concrete next step rather than listing all four options ceremonially, provides a clear follow-up path, no preamble, 36 words.
